title: Ender Scrolls V: Minerim
description: A fabric modpack for 1.21 inspired by Skyrim. Features the Ender Scrolls: Skyrimcraft mod at it's core
body:
A quick modpack I made that is built around the Ender Scrolls: Skyrimcraft mod at it's core. The pack aims to bring a bit of Tamriel into minecraft as well as a bit of minecraft into Tamriel.

Other mods in the pack include:
- Gardens of the Dead for additional nether biomes
- Galosphere for more diverse caves
- stelarity for end generation
- and more

the pack is currently in it's infancy and I will update it as I have time to better integrate mods together
